_note: Set 17 augments. Each augment: name, rarity (Silver/Gold/Prismatic), general_tier (S/A/B), synergies (comp names from seed_comps.json), notes. Recommender ranks the 3 offered augments by tier + synergy with the recommended/current comp.

augments.name: A Magic Roll
augments.notes: Free roll-down on a stage transition; strong opener for fast 8/9.

augments.name: Apotheotic Forge
augments.notes: Build a Radiant item — slot into your main carry.

augments.name: Cosmic Restart
augments.notes: Gold and HP refund — pivots and tempo recovery.

augments.name: Exclusive Customization
augments.notes: Turns one carry into a 1-of-1 build path; reroll comps love this.

augments.name: Exiles II
augments.notes: Shield on isolated units; great for spread fast-9 boards.

augments.name: Restart Mission
augments.notes: Free reroll resets — extremely strong on reroll comps.

augments.name: Rolling For Days I
augments.notes: Stacking free rolls — econ+reroll backbone.

augments.name: Slice of Life
augments.notes: Bonus HP scaling with player HP; defensive opener.

augments.name: Patience is a Virtue
augments.notes: Late-game scaling for slow-roll players.

augments.name: AFK
augments.notes: Lose-streak gold; pair with Anima/Doomer.

augments.name: Band of Thieves
augments.notes: Pair of completed items at 2-1; aggressive opener.

augments.name: Small Grab Bag
augments.notes: Component spread; flexible early.

augments.name: Heart of Steel
augments.notes: Frontline armor scaling; tank-heavy comps.

augments.name: Feed the Flames
augments.notes: Burn damage stacks; AP comps benefit.

augments.name: Heroic Grab Bag
augments.notes: Multiple completed items; defines your carry build.

augments.name: Best Friends I
augments.notes: Adjacency stat bonus; works with paired carries.

augments.name: Group Hug I
augments.notes: Healing aura for clumped boards.

augments.name: The Tower
augments.notes: Massive single-unit buff — Tactician's-Cap-style.

augments.name: Twin Guardians
augments.notes: Two units shield each other; pair-carry comps.

augments.name: Expedition
augments.notes: Econ + items combined; flexible Prismatic pick.

augments.name: Dark Star Heart
augments.notes: Trait emblem — pivot to Dark Star comps.

augments.name: N.O.V.A. Crest
augments.notes: Trait emblem — N.O.V.A. activation breakpoint.

augments.name: Rogue Crest
augments.notes: Free Rogue trait; enables 4 Rogue.

augments.name: Space Groove Crown
augments.notes: Locks in fast 8 Stay Groovy as your win condition.

augments.name: Meeple Heart
augments.notes: Adds to Meeple breakpoint; scales late.

augments.name: Sniper Crest
augments.notes: Free Sniper — ranged AD comps.

augments.name: Worth the Wait
augments.notes: Delayed gold + items; reroll comps.

augments.name: Money Monsoon
augments.notes: Top-tier econ; mandatory keep on fast-9.

augments.name: Hedge Fund
augments.notes: Interest scaling; greed opener.

augments.name: Upward Mobility
augments.notes: Cheaper levels; powers fast 8/9.

augments.name: Deadlier Blades
augments.notes: AD/crit damage; ranged-AD carries.

augments.name: Late Game Scaling
augments.notes: Stacks per round; pairs with greed openers.
